specs.requirement: All RW register read-backs match written data (masked to valid bits)
STATUS (0x0C) and ADC_DATA (0x0E) ignore SPI writes

specs.description: All registers hold correct reset values after rst_n deassertion
specs.requirement: See register map in program.md for reset values
specs.pass_criterion: all 14 registers read reset value within 1 cycle of rst_n release

specs.requirement: Write to 0x0F ignored; read from 0x0F returns 0x00

specs.description: FSM phase durations match parameters exactly
specs.requirement: SAMPLE=64, EVALUATE=128, COMPARE=4, WAIT=804 cycles
SAMPLE + EVALUATE + COMPARE + WAIT = 1000
At most one of fsm_sample/fsm_evaluate/fsm_compare high at any cycle
specs.pass_criterion: zero overlap cycles in 10 consecutive periods

specs.description: fsm_done pulses exactly 1 clock at COMPARE->WAIT boundary
specs.requirement: fsm_done = 1 for exactly 1 clock, at cnt=195

specs.description: Reset during FSM operation clears all outputs
specs.requirement: All phase signals go to 0 within 1 clk of rst_n assertion
IRQ asserts after debounce_val consecutive anomaly detections
specs.pass_criterion: IRQ asserts on exactly the Nth consecutive detection (N = debounce_val)

specs.requirement: Any class_result=0 resets detect_count to 0
specs.pass_criterion: counter resets, N consecutive anomalies needed again

specs.description: debounce_val=0: IRQ asserts on first detection
specs.requirement: With DEBOUNCE register = 0, first anomaly immediately triggers IRQ
specs.pass_criterion: irq_n = 0 on first fsm_done with class_result != 0

specs.requirement: Switching from class A to class B (both non-zero) resets counter
specs.pass_criterion: counter = 1 after class change, must reach debounce_val again

specs.requirement: IRQ_N changes within same fsm_done clock cycle
specs.pass_criterion: < 2 clock cycle latency for both assert and deassert

specs.description: STATUS register captures class_result on class_valid pulse
specs.requirement: STATUS[3:0] = class_result, STATUS[7] = 1 when class_valid pulses
First SPI read of STATUS returns valid bit set; second read returns it clear

specs.description: ADC_CTRL[2] start bit self-clears after 1 cycle
specs.requirement: Write ADC_CTRL with start=1; read back shows start=0 next cycle

specs.description: ADC_DATA captures adc_data_in when ADC not busy
specs.requirement: adc_data_in value appears in ADC_DATA register when adc_busy_in deasserts
specs.pass_criterion: SPI read of 0x0E returns correct value

specs.requirement: After Yosys abc optimization
Dynamic + leakage at 1.8V, 1 MHz, 25C
After synthesis timing analysis
specs.pass_criterion: > 5 MHz (estimated > 15 MHz based on critical path)

specs.requirement: All storage must be flip-flops

specs.description: No X/Z on any output after reset release
specs.requirement: All outputs have defined values within 1 cycle of rst_n deassertion
